author: Hendrycks & Gimpel (2016)
title: Gaussian Error Linear Units (GELUs)
why: Fungsi aktivasi GELU, standar di Transformer & BERT

author: Ba, Kiros & Hinton (2016)
title: Layer Normalization
why: Normalisasi per-layer, komponen wajib tiap block Transformer

author: Sennrich, Haddow & Birch (2016)
title: Neural Machine Translation of Rare Words with Subword Units
why: Asal-usul subword BPE buat handle kata langka

author: Hinton, Vinyals & Dean (2015)
title: Distilling the Knowledge in a Neural Network
why: Konsep dasar knowledge distillation, fondasi DistilBERT dkk

author: Dai & Le (2015)
title: Semi-supervised Sequence Learning
why: Cikal bakal pretrain-lalu-finetune buat NLP

author: Schuster & Nakajima (2012)
title: Japanese and Korean Voice Search
why: Tokenizer WordPiece yang dipakai BERT

author: Kudo & Richardson (2018)
title: SentencePiece: A simple and language independent subword tokenizer and detokenizer for Neural Text Processing
why: Tokenizer language-agnostic, gampang dipakai lintas bahasa

author: Kudo (2018)
title: Subword Regularization: Improving Neural Network Translation Models with Multiple Subword Candidates
why: Unigram LM tokenizer + regularisasi segmentasi subword

author: Wang, Cho & Gu (2019)
title: Neural Machine Translation with Byte-Level Subwords
why: Byte-level BPE, vocab kecil tanpa OOV ala GPT-2

author: Howard & Ruder (2018)
title: Universal Language Model Fine-tuning for Text Classification
why: Resep transfer learning + fine-tuning bertahap buat teks

author: Peters et al. (2018)
title: Deep contextualized word representations
why: Embedding kontekstual dari LM, kata beda makna beda vektor

author: Radford et al. (2018)
title: Improving Language Understanding by Generative Pre-Training
why: Generative pretraining Transformer decoder pertama

author: Vaswani et al. (2017)
title: Attention Is All You Need
why: The Transformer, induk semua LM modern

author: Shaw, Uszkoreit & Vaswani (2018)
title: Self-Attention with Relative Position Representations
why: Positional encoding relatif, alternatif sinusoidal

author: Devlin et al. (2019)
title: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
why: Encoder bidirectional, masked LM yang ngubah NLP

author: Radford et al. (2019)
title: Language Models are Unsupervised Multitask Learners
why: LM gede zero-shot multitask, byte-level BPE

author: Sanh et al. (2019)
title: DistilBERT, a distilled version of BERT: smaller, faster, cheaper and lighter
why: BERT didistilasi, 40% lebih kecil tetep ngebut

author: Liu et al. (2019)
title: RoBERTa: A Robustly Optimized BERT Pretraining Approach
why: BERT dilatih lebih optimal, tuning resep pretraining

author: Reimers & Gurevych (2019)
title: Sentence-BERT: Sentence Embeddings using Siamese BERT-Networks
why: BERT buat embedding kalimat, cepat buat similarity

author: Lewis et al. (2019)
title: BART: Denoising Sequence-to-Sequence Pre-training for Natural Language Generation, Translation, and Comprehension
why: Seq2seq denoising, encoder-decoder buat generasi

author: Lan et al. (2019)
title: ALBERT: A Lite BERT for Self-supervised Learning of Language Representations
why: BERT hemat parameter via sharing & faktorisasi embedding

author: Sun et al. (2019)
title: Patient Knowledge Distillation for BERT Model Compression
why: Distilasi BERT belajar dari layer-layer tengah guru

author: Jiao et al. (2019)
title: TinyBERT: Distilling BERT for Natural Language Understanding
why: Distilasi BERT dua tahap, kecil banget buat mobile

author: Clark et al. (2020)
title: ELECTRA: Pre-training Text Encoders as Discriminators Rather Than Generators
why: Pretraining deteksi token palsu, lebih efisien dari MLM

author: Raffel et al. (2019)
title: Exploring the Limits of Transfer Learning with a Unified Text-to-Text Transformer
why: Semua tugas NLP jadi text-to-text, plus studi transfer masif

author: Yang et al. (2019)
title: XLNet: Generalized Autoregressive Pretraining for Language Understanding
why: Permutation LM, gabung kelebihan autoregressive & BERT

author: Sun et al. (2020)
title: MobileBERT: a Compact Task-Agnostic BERT for Resource-Limited Devices
why: BERT tipis buat HP lewat bottleneck & distilasi
